original text:
Jersey State Bank has an immediate opening for a chief lending officer who will be a member of the Executive Leadership Team and will be involved in major decisions for the organization.
This person will direct and supervise all phases of lending operations, including activities for loan origination and servicing and credit risk management activities and needs.
Strong supervisory skills, training and developing loan officers, and marketing and communications are essential.
Resumes should be emailed to Hiring@jsbmail.com.
For additional information, please contact Mark Schaefer at 618-498-6466.
